creator: ip@manchester.ac.uk
text:
I upgraded my main console server from 4.11 to 6.3 (it's a nameserver, too)
and am unable to access the second 16 ports on a 32 port Cyclades Cyclom-Y.
The device entries aren't created.

utserv% dmesg | grep cy0
cy0: <Cyclades Cyclom-Y Serial Adapter> port 0xa800-0xa87f mem 0xcffffc00-0xcffffc7f,0xcfff8000-0xcfffbfff irq 21 at device 11.0 on pci1
cy0: [FAST]

utserv% ls -l /dev/cuac?? 
crw-rw----  1 uucp  dialer    0,  42 Jul 29 16:17 /dev/cuac00
crw-rw----  1 uucp  dialer    0,  48 Jul 29 16:17 /dev/cuac01
crw-rw----  1 uucp  dialer    0,  54 Jul 29 16:17 /dev/cuac02
crw-rw----  1 uucp  dialer    0,  60 Jul 29 16:17 /dev/cuac03
crw-rw----  1 uucp  dialer    0,  66 Jul 29 16:17 /dev/cuac04
crw-rw----  1 uucp  dialer    0,  72 Jul 29 16:17 /dev/cuac05
crw-rw----  1 uucp  dialer    0,  78 Jul 29 16:17 /dev/cuac06
crw-rw----  1 uucp  dialer    0,  84 Jul 29 16:17 /dev/cuac07
crw-rw----  1 uucp  dialer    0,  90 Jul 29 16:17 /dev/cuac08
crw-rw----  1 uucp  dialer    0,  96 Jul 29 16:17 /dev/cuac09

crw-rw----  1 uucp  dialer    0, 108 Jul 29 16:17 /dev/cuac0b
crw-rw----  1 uucp  dialer    0, 114 Jul 29 16:17 /dev/cuac0c
crw-rw----  1 uucp  dialer    0, 120 Jul 29 16:17 /dev/cuac0d
crw-rw----  1 uucp  dialer    0, 126 Jul 29 16:17 /dev/cuac0e
crw-rw----  1 uucp  dialer    0, 132 Jul 29 16:17 /dev/cuac0f

utserv% fgrep cuac /usr/local/etc/conserver.cf
vulture::/dev/cuac00:9600p:/var/log/conserver/vulture:0
spare01::/dev/cuac01:9600p:/var/log/conserver/spare01:0
